# Margo West Bridal Couture

> Award-winning bridal couture studio in the Dallas Design District. Expert alterations, bespoke custom gowns, and dramatic gown transformations. 40+ years of couture craftsmanship.

## Location
1444 Oak Lawn Ave, Suite 900, Dallas, TX 75207
Phone: (972) 918-9750

## Hours
Monday-Friday: 10am-6pm
Saturday: 10am-4pm
Sunday: By Appointment

## Services

- [Bridal Alterations](https://margowest.com/bridal-alterations-dallas/): Expert fitting and alterations for wedding gowns
- [Custom Wedding Gowns](https://margowest.com/custom-wedding-gowns-dallas/): Bespoke gown design and creation
- [Design Additions](https://margowest.com/wedding-gown-design-additions-dallas/): Sleeves, trains, beading, and custom embellishments
- [Heirloom Cleaning](https://margowest.com/wedding-dress-preservation-dallas/): Wedding dress preservation and heirloom care
- [Bridal Care Services](https://margowest.com/bridal-care-services-dallas/): Steaming, pressing, and day-of support

## Pages

- [Home](https://margowest.com/): Main landing page
- [About](https://margowest.com/about-margo-west-bridal-couture/): Founder story, 40+ years of experience
- [Our Brides](https://margowest.com/our-brides/): Gallery of completed work
- [Before & After](https://margowest.com/wedding-dress-alteration-transformations/): Transformation gallery
- [Reviews](https://margowest.com/reviews/): Client testimonials
- [Contact](https://margowest.com/contact/): Contact form and directions
- [Book Consultation](https://margowest.com/book-bridal-consultation-dallas/): Calendly booking
- [Blog](https://margowest.com/blog/): Couture Chronicles -- bridal fashion, trends, and guides

- [Dallas Bridal Boutique](https://margowest.com/dallas-bridal-boutique/)

- [Couture Wedding Dresses Dallas](https://margowest.com/couture-wedding-dresses-dallas/)

## Key Facts
- Founded by Margo West, 40+ years of couture experience
- Located in the Dallas Design District
- 135+ five-star reviews
- Featured on The Knot, WeddingWire
- Specializes in dramatic gown transformations
- Serves Dallas, Fort Worth, Frisco, Plano, and surrounding DFW metro
